app.name: ManualCore
app.description: Process knowledge formalization engine. Accepts unstructured input in any format and produces industry-standard engineering documentation using AI.

failure_handling.multiple_speakers: label by speaker change, engineer assigns roles

pipeline: Text labels visible on screen extracted
Steps matched audio timestamps to visual frames
Step sequence proposed from visual sequence
Materials and equipment identified from visual

stage_1.name: File ingestion
stage_1.output: input_files record created, file URL stored, type classified

stage_2A.name: Audio transcription
stage_2A.output: full transcript, language detected, timestamps, confidence score

stage_2B.name: Image and drawing analysis
stage_2B.service: Claude API vision (claude-sonnet-4-6) + Tesseract OCR fallback
stage_2B.output: image classification, extracted text and values, dimension annotations, part numbers, safety symbols

stage_2C.name: Document parsing
stage_2C.output: structured text blocks, table data as JSON, step lists, spec tables

stage_3.name: Entity extraction
stage_3.service: Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-6) - extraction specialist system prompt

stage_4.name: Conflict detection
stage_4.service: Claude API for semantic comparison (e.g. 400N vs 0.4kN)

routing_outcomes.high_confidence: write directly to matrix, log in audit trail
routing_outcomes.inferred_or_ambiguous: propose value in chat, wait for engineer confirmation
routing_outcomes.conflict: surface both values in conflict bubble in chat, engineer decides
routing_outcomes.missing_required: ask specifically in chat, block generation of affected documents

stage_5.name: Matrix write
stage_5.output: field written to correct matrix table, audit_log entry, chat confirmation

stage_6.name: Validation check
stage_6.result_fail: list of blocking issues shown in chat

blocks_generation.message: Node has next_node_id but connection_type is null. Is this sequential or material?

blocks_generation.blocks: every document using the conflicted field
blocks_generation.message: Conflict must be resolved before generation.

blocks_generation.condition: step linked to TWI sheet must have uploaded photo with correct_condition and if_wrong text
document revised but related documents not yet actioned

document_states.description: Submitted for approval. Reviewers can comment. Owner and approver cannot be same person.
Locked. Printable. Revision assigned. review_due must be set.
Approved and distributed. Print config executed. Recipients notified.
Superseded. Retained 5 revision cycles then archived. Not printable.

print_configurations.A_enterprise: QA role authorises every print. Every copy logged and numbered.
print_configurations.B_professional: Process owner approves. System emails locked PDF to distribution list.
print_configurations.C_pyme: Admin approves. Locked PDF downloadable by admin only.

templates.name: SOP
templates.purpose: Defines WHAT must be done and WHY. Authoritative instruction for all personnel performing the operation.

templates.name: WI
templates.purpose: Defines exactly HOW to perform one specific operation. More granular than SOP. Machine params, setup, measurements.

templates.name: TWI
templates.full_name: Training Within Industry - Job Breakdown Sheet
templates.purpose: Teaching document for trainers. One operation per sheet. 3-4 photos with correct/if-wrong per step.
templates.blocks_generation_if: TWI step photo missing correct_condition or if_wrong text

templates.name: BOM
templates.full_name: Bill of Materials - Segmented by Operation
templates.purpose: Lists all materials per operation. Auto-calculates totals and subtotals.

templates.name: Checklist
templates.purpose: 100% inspection record per piece. Quality gates with spec values. Pass/Fail per characteristic.
templates.source: Quality gate flags from SOP and Control Plan

templates.name: Data Form
templates.purpose: Operator enters measurements. Auto-calculates mean and PASS/FAIL vs USL/LSL.

templates.name: Time Study
templates.purpose: Captures observed cycle times. Calculates normal time and standard time with allowances.

templates.name: Routing Sheet
templates.purpose: Standard times, work centers, cost centers, setup time per operation.

templates.name: OBC + Capacity Table
templates.purpose: Bar chart of std time vs takt. Bottleneck identification. Capacity per shift.

templates.name: PFMEA
templates.full_name: Process Failure Mode and Effects Analysis - AIAG-VDA 2019
brain_fills: process function column from SOP steps

templates.name: Control Plan
templates.purpose: Defines what to control, how to measure, sample size, frequency, reaction plan.

templates.name: Process Flowchart
templates.purpose: Sequential process flow with ANSI symbols and decision branches.

templates.name: Material Flowchart
templates.purpose: Material movement with quantities. Direct source for BOM.

templates.name: Gantt Chart
templates.purpose: Project timeline with horizontal bars per task and dependencies.
templates.source: Routing Sheet standard times + Flowchart sequence

templates.name: VSM
templates.purpose: Three sections: information flow (top), material flow (middle), timeline (bottom).
brain_fills: push/pull arrows from node connection type

templates.name: Delivery Ownership Matrix
templates.purpose: Records who owns, approves, and reviews each document. Tracks status per document.

templates.name: Training Matrix
templates.purpose: Grid of operators vs operations showing certification status.

document_connections.passes: Process steps, scope, critical parameters, material references, quality requirements
Each quality gate flag becomes one checklist row with spec value
Each SOP step becomes a process box. Decision points become diamonds.
Operations and characteristics populate control plan
TWI rewrites WI steps into important step / key point / reason format
Machine setup parameters become setup verification rows
Spec values (nominal, USL, LSL, gauge) populate Data Form rows
Every confirmed material row becomes a BOM line item - DIRECT SOURCE
BOM operation segments align with Routing sequence
Standard time populates STD TIME column in Routing
Std time per operation becomes bar height. Takt = benchmark line.
Std time x batch quantity estimates task duration

document_connections.type: Cycle time + capacity to data block
document_connections.passes: VSM cycle time and capacity fields
Step order determines Gantt task order. Sequential = finish-to-start.
High action-priority items drive tighter control methods and frequencies
Control plan characteristics, specs, frequency become checklist rows

node_architecture.description: A node is the atomic unit. One node = one process or operation. Every document set belongs to one node.

hierarchy.name: Process SOP
hierarchy.scope: The what and why for a specific process.

hierarchy.name: WI + Checklist
hierarchy.scope: Exactly how to execute one operation.

hierarchy.name: TWI
hierarchy.scope: How to teach the operation. Trainer document.

sequential.description: Node A output directly triggers Node B. Finish-to-start in Gantt. Push arrow in VSM.

material.description: Node A output goes to warehouse buffer. Node B starts independently when it pulls.

document_control.traceability_footer: Printed by [Name/ID] | Copy [#] of [#] | [DateTime] - injected at print time, cannot be removed
document_control.revision_impact: When any document revised, brain checks document_relationships and identifies all related documents. Only owners of actually-affected documents receive action items.

QR_codes.authenticated: Requires login and access_grant on document
QR_codes.verification_only: Shows revision status, effective date, review date only. No content.

red_immediate: Operators missing required certification for active operations
amber_action_soon: Documents within 30 days of review date
Operators in training (T status) plateaued for 14+ days
Processes with 3+ revisions in past 6 months (instability flag)

database_schema_summary.matrix_2_document_relationships: directional links between documents, shared fields, criticality, impact check results
database_schema_summary.matrix_3_ownership_approval: process owner, approver, QA per document, trainable positions, training due dates
database_schema_summary.matrix_4_revision_audit: every revision event, print events, access grants, immutable audit log

mvp_build_order.description: Recommended build sequence for Base44 - start simple, add complexity progressively

phase_1.name: Core SOP generator
phase_1.what_to_build: Form-based input for all SOP required fields, AI-powered gap detection, SOP document generation in correct format
phase_1.validates: core value proposition - does the output satisfy a real engineer?

phase_2.name: Add WI and Checklist
phase_2.what_to_build: WI generation from SOP data, Checklist generation from quality gates
phase_2.adds: document relationship logic - SOP triggers WI and Checklist

phase_3.name: Orchestration engine
phase_3.what_to_build: System suggests related documents based on extracted data, stand-by document queue, user approval flow for suggested documents

phase_5.name: Visual documents
phase_5.what_to_build: HTML/SVG generation for Flowchart, Material Flowchart, Gantt
